scripts.tauri:android:init: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/setup-android-env.ps1 -InstallRustTargets && tauri android init
scripts.tauri:android:dev: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/setup-android-env.ps1 && npm run sync:sidecar-ui && tauri android dev
scripts.tauri:android:build: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/setup-android-env.ps1 && npm run sync:sidecar-ui && tauri android build --apk
